---
title: "Projects"
---

## Class Projects

### 📊 SQL Analysis
*[1–2 sentences: what dataset did you use, what question were you answering?]*

- **Tools:** SQL, R
- **Skills:** Data querying, filtering, joins, aggregation
-  ← replace # with your link

---

### 📝 Text Analysis
*[1–2 sentences: what text data did you analyze, what did you find?]*

- **Tools:** R (tidytext, ggplot2)
- **Skills:** Sentiment analysis, tokenization, word frequency
-  ← replace # with your link

---

## Beyond-Class Project

### 🔍 [Job Across US]
*[1–2 sentences: what is it, what problem does it solve?]*

- **Tools:** [e.g., R, Python, Tableau — whatever you used]
- **Status:** Completed
-  ← replace # with your link
